Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Soulsmithing]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon works on his Soulsmithing.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — The Ancestor's Spearhead is an invaluable material for Soulsmithing.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — Soulsmithing is a process that may be involved in the creation of certain constructs.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Dross has a solid foundation in Soulsmithing due to information constructs from Ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — In Soulsmithing, some techniques resonate with one another when activated together.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon enjoys Soulsmithing.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon practices Soulsmithing in the evenings.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Soulsmithing is a skill Lindon intends to practice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Soulsmithing involves using hammers to batter dead matter into place or crack open a Remnant's carapace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — The highest level of Soulsmithing must be approached with care due to the high price of success.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Archlord artifacts are considered the peak of traditional Soulsmithing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Soulsmithing can create useless products.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon possesses Soulsmithing supplies.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Fisher Gesha has Soulsmithing facilities in tunnels.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — There was no evidence of Soulsmithing in the world.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
